subcodes.first_line: O Allah-Verdi! Through spiritual melodies, stations divine, and soulful breathings that issue forth from the throat of God's love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای الله ویردی الحان روحانی و مقامات و انفاس وجدانیله حنجر محبت رحمانیدن چیقان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
